message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): '__vlan_insert_inner_tag' sets signal field 'vlan_ethhdr.h_vlan_proto', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=vlan_ethhdr;field=h_vlan_proto;offset=12] [oracle:assert=vlan_ethhdr.h_vlan_proto stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets h_vlan_proto without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
